# NEXO Brain

> Cognitive co-operator for Claude Code. Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model with 105+ MCP tools.

NEXO Brain is an MCP server that gives AI coding agents persistent, psychologically-grounded memory. It implements the Atkinson-Shiffrin memory model (Sensory Register, Short-Term Memory, Long-Term Memory) with vector embeddings, semantic RAG retrieval, and automatic memory lifecycle management.

## Key Features (v0.7.0)

- **Cognitive Memory**: STM/LTM stores with Ebbinghaus decay, semantic consolidation, sibling detection, prediction error gating
- **Adaptive Personality**: 3 modes (FLOW/NORMAL/TENSION) driven by 6 weighted signals. Weights learn from real feedback via Ridge regression (shadow mode, momentum, auto-rollback)
- **Somatic Markers**: Pain memory per file/area. Files that cause repeated errors accumulate risk scores. Guard warns on HIGH RISK (>0.5) and CRITICAL (>0.8)
- **Trust Score**: Alignment index (0-100) that modulates guard rigor. Auto-adjusts on corrections, thanks, delegations
- **Guard System**: Pre-edit checks with learnings, blocking rules, cognitive semantic matches, somatic risk scores
- **Session Coordination**: Multi-terminal support with heartbeat, file tracking, inter-session messaging
- **Episodic Memory**: Change log, decisions with outcomes, session diaries with mental state continuity
- **Full Orchestration**: 5 automated hooks, post-mortem with self-critique, pre-compaction context preservation, reflection engine

## Installation

```bash
npx nexo-brain
```

- GitHub: https://github.com/wazionapps/nexo
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/nexo-brain
